headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https: http: https://accounts.google.com; frame-src https://accounts.google.com;
